data.name: My Swimsuit Bully
data.detailed_description:
You’re a university student whose careless mistake puts everything you’ve worked for at risk. After being caught ogling Amari, your university's best swimmer, you find yourself threatened by Amari. Secretly, Amari has a cruel streak hidden beneath her charming public image. To protect your future, you’re forced to obey her every demand as she drags you deeper into a humiliating and degrading relationship you never expected to enjoy.

Experience a day of submission with Amari, the sadistic, sexy, big-breasted, and narcissistic swim team ace who loves bullying, controlling, and tormenting you as her personal servant. But secretly, you enjoy her bullying, and she brings out your masochistic urges.

  • ~2.1K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character animations

  • 25 Total images

  • A gallery featuring all animations in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
